2362510.name: Doki Simp Club
2362510.description:
Ren is your typical simp...a luckless loser constantly getting stepped on by everyone. One day he was simping for a hot e-girl on a new popular streaming site and *poof* all his money is gone. Little did he know that his simping would be needed to save the world. Join him in this epic simping adventure in a new form of visual novel literature.

Features


  • Amazing anime story and art
  • Simp for e-girl queens
  • Don't lose any of your actual money!
  • Make hot anime girls happy
  • Earn money to simp for your gorgeous queens
  • Uncover the dark secrets of an evil billionaires plan

The start of an epic saga

Doki Simp Club is the beginning of a new breed of heroic tales with unique gameplay not seen before in other anime novel works. We'll be bringing even more ways to simp and additional e-girls for you to throw your hard-earned money at.


So what are you waiting for? Come make your queens happy. They're waiting for you.
